item.title: A simple concealer chilling tip
item.description: A quick beauty tip: chill concealer for 10 minutes before use for a tackier, full-coverage finish.

media:content.media:description: A quick beauty tip: chill concealer for 10 minutes before use for a tackier, full-coverage finish.
